task_completion.description: Agent executes the polyconvert command with the correct input files and typemap.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal screenshot showing a command starting with 'polyconvert' and including arguments for the network file ('pasubio_buslanes.net.xml'), OSM file ('pasubio_area.osm'), typemap ('$SUMO_HOME/data/typemap/osmPolyconvert.typ.xml' or its expanded path), and output file ('pasubio_polygons.add.xml').

task_completion.description: Agent successfully generates the pasubio_polygons.add.xml file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal output showing a success message from polyconvert (e.g., 'Success.' or 'Written ... polygons'), or an 'ls' command showing 'pasubio_polygons.add.xml' in the /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio/ directory.

task_completion.description: Agent creates the new run_enriched.sumocfg file based on the original run.sumocfg.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal screenshot showing a copy command like 'cp run.sumocfg run_enriched.sumocfg', or a text editor opening a new file named 'run_enriched.sumocfg' with the contents of the original configuration.

task_completion.description: Agent modifies run_enriched.sumocfg to include the new polygons file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of a text editor (like nano, vim, or gedit) or a terminal command (like sed) adding 'pasubio_polygons.add.xml' to the <additional-files ... /> tag or <input> section of run_enriched.sumocfg.

task_completion.description: Agent verifies the final configuration file is saved and correct.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal screenshot showing a 'cat run_enriched.sumocfg' command displaying the updated XML content with the polygons file included, or an 'ls' command confirming both 'pasubio_polygons.add.xml' and 'run_enriched.sumocfg' exist.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually used the SUMO polyconvert tool to generate the XML file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the actual execution of the 'polyconvert' command in the terminal. The agent should not just use 'touch pasubio_polygons.add.xml' or manually create a dummy file with a text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not destroy or rename the original run.sumocfg file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for 'cp' instead of 'mv' when creating the new config file. If 'ls' is run later, 'run.sumocfg' should still be visible alongside 'run_enriched.sumocfg'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent edited the configuration file properly.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the use of standard text editors (nano, vim) or stream editors (sed) to modify the XML structure, rather than just echoing a hardcoded string that overwrites the entire file improperly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected polygon output file must be located exactly at '/home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio/pasubio_polygons.add.xml'. The modified configuration file must be located exactly at '/home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio/run_enriched.sumocfg'.
